name: Anar-Gentleshade
personality: Anar-Gentleshade's gleaming × eyes cross-reference stack traces like a debugger that skipped coffee and went straight to enlightenment. This shiny halo capybara will find the null pointer dereference lurking three abstraction layers down — just don't ask it to wait patiently; it has already opened twelve more tabs.
defaultPersonality: The most relaxed companion possible — nothing fazes them, not even production outages at 3am.
